tools.signPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to sign.
tools.signPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行签名。

tools.signPdf.instruction1.en: Click the Signature tool (pen icon) in the toolbar
tools.signPdf.instruction1.zh: 点击工具栏中的签名工具（钢笔图标）

tools.signPdf.instruction2.en: Draw, type, or upload your signature
tools.signPdf.instruction2.zh: 绘制、输入或上传您的签名

tools.signPdf.instruction3.en: Click where you want to place the signature
tools.signPdf.instruction3.zh: 点击要放置签名的位置

tools.signPdf.instruction4.en: Click "Save Signed PDF" below when done
tools.signPdf.instruction4.zh: 完成后点击下方的「保存签名PDF」

tools.signPdf.flattenOption.zh: 扁平化签名（推荐 - 使签名永久）

tools.cropPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to crop.
tools.cropPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行裁剪。

tools.repairPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files to repair.
tools.repairPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处进行修复。

tools.dividePages.previewInfo.en: Each page will be divided based on the selected option.
tools.dividePages.previewInfo.zh: 每页将根据所选选项进行分割。

tools.encryptPdf.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your passwords are processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.encryptPdf.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.encryptPdf.userPasswordHint.en: Required to open and view the PDF.
tools.encryptPdf.userPasswordHint.zh: 打开和查看PDF时需要此密码。

tools.encryptPdf.ownerPasswordHint.en: Required to modify permissions or remove encryption.
tools.encryptPdf.ownerPasswordHint.zh: 修改权限或移除加密时需要此密码。

tools.encryptPdf.successHint.en: Remember to save your passwords securely.

tools.decryptPdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop an encrypted PDF file.
tools.decryptPdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放加密的PDF文件到此处。

tools.decryptPdf.privacyNotice.en: 🔒 Your password is processed locally and never sent to any server.
tools.decryptPdf.privacyNotice.zh: 🔒 您的密码在本地处理，永远不会发送到任何服务器。

tools.decryptPdf.passwordHint.en: Leave empty if the PDF only has owner password restrictions.
tools.decryptPdf.passwordHint.zh: 如果PDF仅有所有者密码限制，可留空。

tools.decryptPdf.successHint.en: The PDF is now unlocked and can be opened without a password.
tools.decryptPdf.successHint.zh: PDF现已解锁，无需密码即可打开。

tools.decryptPdf.invalidPassword.en: The password you entered is incorrect. Please check and try again.
tools.decryptPdf.invalidPassword.zh: 您输入的密码不正确，请检查后重试。

tools.rotatePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop a PDF file to rotate pages.
tools.rotatePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处以旋转页面。

tools.rotatePdf.hint.en: Click the rotation buttons on each page to rotate individually, or use the buttons above to rotate all pages.
tools.rotatePdf.hint.zh: 点击每页上的旋转按钮单独旋转，或使用上方按钮旋转所有页面。
